glosses.es: ponerse de acuerdo; llegar a un acuerdo
glosses.fr: se mettre d'accord; parvenir à un accord
glosses.zh-Hans: 达成一致; 达成协议
glosses.yue: 達成共識; 達成協議
glosses.pt: chegar a um acordo; pôr-se de acordo
glosses.vi: đồng ý; đạt được thỏa thuận
glosses.nl: het eens worden; tot overeenstemming komen
glosses.ro: se pune de acord; ajunge la un acord
glosses.ja: 合意する; 話がまとまる

translations.es: Estamos de acuerdo en pedir pizza.
translations.fr: On est d'accord pour commander une pizza.
translations.vi: Chúng mình đồng ý gọi pizza.
translations.hi: हम पिज़्ज़ा मंगाने पर सहमत हैं.
translations.cs: Domlouváme se, že si dáme pizzu.
translations.ja: ピザにすることに決めた。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb (present, 1pl here) meaning ‘to come to an agreement’; used reflexively (sich einigen) and typically with a prepositional complement (auf + Akk.).
Reflexive personal pronoun (1pl, accusative), coreferential with the subject; required by the reflexive verb usage (sich einigen).
Preposition governing accusative; introduces the agreement topic/object.
Common noun; accusative object of the preposition ‘auf’ specifying what is agreed upon.

sentences.target: Sie einigen sich morgen im Büro.

translations.de: Sie einigen sich morgen im Büro.
translations.en: They’ll agree tomorrow at the office.
translations.es: Mañana se pondrán de acuerdo en la oficina.
translations.fr: Ils se mettront d'accord demain au bureau.
translations.it: Si metteranno d'accordo domani in ufficio.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们明天在办公室达成一致。
translations.yue: 佢哋聽日喺辦公室達成共識。
translations.pt: Eles vão chegar a um acordo amanhã no escritório.
translations.vi: Họ sẽ thống nhất vào ngày mai tại văn phòng.
translations.nl: Ze worden het morgen eens op kantoor.
translations.hi: वे कल दफ़्तर में सहमत होंगे.
translations.pl: Jutro w biurze dojdą do porozumienia.
translations.nb: De blir enige i morgen på kontoret.
translations.id: Mereka akan mencapai kesepakatan besok di kantor.
translations.sv: De kommer överens i morgon på kontoret.
translations.ro: Se vor pune de acord mâine la birou.
translations.da: De bliver enige i morgen på kontoret.
translations.ja: 彼らは明日、オフィスで話をまとめる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative as subject; ambiguous between 3pl ‘sie’ (they) and formal 2sg/pl ‘Sie’ (you).
Finite verb (present; 3pl or formal 2 depending on ‘Sie’); used reflexively (sich einigen) meaning ‘to agree’.
Reflexive pronoun (3rd person or formal 2nd; accusative); complements the reflexive verb (sich einigen).
Temporal adverb specifying time.
Contraction of ‘in dem’; preposition marking dative for the following noun; introduces a locative PP.
Common noun; dative object of the preposition ‘im’; denotes location.

translations.es: Nos pondremos de acuerdo en eso más tarde.
translations.fr: On se mettra d'accord là-dessus plus tard.
translations.it: Ci metteremo d'accordo su quello più tardi.
translations.vi: Chúng ta sẽ thống nhất việc đó sau.
translations.nl: Daarover worden we later het eens.
translations.hi: उस पर हम बाद में सहमत होंगे.
translations.nb: Det blir vi enige om senere.
translations.id: Kita akan sepakat soal itu nanti.
translations.sv: Det kommer vi överens om senere.
translations.ro: Vom cădea de acord asupra acestui lucru mai târziu.
translations.da: Det bliver vi enige om senere.

tokens.explanation: Pronominal adverb (da+auf) meaning ‘on that’; substitutes an ‘auf + NP’ complement and is fronted; refers to a previously mentioned topic.
Finite verb (present, 1pl here); used reflexively (sich einigen).
1st person plural personal pronoun in nominative; subject (post-verbal due to V2 word order).
Reflexive personal pronoun (1pl, accusative), complement of the reflexive verb (sich einigen).
Temporal adverb; indicates time.

sentences.target: Am Ende einigen sich beide auf Jana.
sentences.reading: /am ˈɛndə ˈaɪ̯nɪɡən zɪç ˈbaɪ̯də aʊ̯f ˈjaːna/

translations.de: Am Ende einigen sich beide auf Jana.
translations.ipa: /am ˈɛndə ˈaɪ̯nɪɡən zɪç ˈbaɪ̯də aʊ̯f ˈjaːna/
translations.en: In the end, both agree on Jana.
translations.es: Al final, ambos se deciden por Jana.
translations.yue: 最後兩個人都揀咗 Jana。
translations.pt: No fim, os dois escolhem Jana.
translations.vi: Cuối cùng, cả hai đều chọn Jana.
translations.nl: Uiteindelijk kiezen ze allebei voor Jana.
translations.hi: आखिर में दोनों ने जाना को चुना.
translations.el: Στο τέλος, και οι δύο επέλεξαν την Τζάνα.
translations.ro: În cele din urmă, amândoi au ales-o pe Jana.
translations.da: Til sidst valgte de begge Jana.
translations.ja: 最終的に、二人ともジャナを選んだ。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of ‘an dem’; preposition marking dative for the following noun; forms a time PP.
Common noun; dative object of ‘Am’; time expression (‘at the end’).
Finite verb (present, 3pl here); used reflexively (sich einigen).
Reflexive pronoun (3rd person, accusative); complements the reflexive verb.
Indefinite pronoun in nominative plural; subject (‘both’).
Preposition governing accusative; introduces the agreement object.
Proper noun (personal name); accusative object of ‘auf’, indicating the agreed choice.
